name: conduit-browser
description: A translucent multi-pane Electron browser with a boot-to-settings flow, Standard and Multiple IP modes, location fallback, pane reconnection, sound routing, and optimized one-to-eight-pane following.

scripts.check: node --check src/main-entry-v18.js && node --check src/main-v18.js && node --check src/workspace-v21.js && node --check src/preload-v18.js && node --check src/page-preload-v18.js && node --check src/renderer/app-v21.js && node --check src/adblocker.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/tor-manager.js && node --check src/tor-bridge.js && npm test
